cellpaintr 0.99.0

cellpaintr

Description

Analyze CRISPR and drug perturbations with CellProfiler features.

Installation

Install cellpaintr through our GitHub repository:

install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("ChristofSeiler/cellpaintr")
